name: Crockpot Cowloon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned chicken in the slow cooker.
3. In a separate bowl, combine ginger, garlic, broth, and pineapple syrup.
4. Cut the pineapple slices into fourths and arrange them over the chicken.
5. Scatter water chestnuts evenly over the chicken.
6. Pour the ginger sauce mixture over everything.
7. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour.
8. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for an additional 2 to 3 hours, or until the chicken is tender (it can be cooked up to 8 hours).
9. Add green onions.
10. Dissolve cornstarch in soy sauce and vinegar.
11. Stir into the pot.
12. Cover and cook on high for 10 to 15 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
13. Serve with crisp Chinese noodles.
